description: Warn before running git commit if npm run build has not been confirmed as having run in the current session. release-cloudflare/ must always reflect the current source before committing.
message: BUILD CHECK: Confirm that `npm run build` has been run since the last source file edit. release-cloudflare/ must be in sync before committing — it is what Cloudflare Pages deploys. If unsure, run `npm run build` first.
